title: Swap Two Numbers Without Temp Variable
description:
Given two numbers `a` and `b`, swap them without using a temporary variable.

Return an array `[b, a]` with the swapped values.
hints: You can use arithmetic operations: a = a + b, then b = a - b, then a = a - b.
XOR operation has the property: x ^ x = 0 and x ^ 0 = x.
In modern JavaScript, you can use destructuring: [a, b] = [b, a].
